title: Rick's Default
description: An overhaul to vanilla you'll forget is there.  adding QOL and variation features to Minecraft's default textures.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9829872d8995e375eb1a5341358d793ab39c3bb2.jpeg)

## A vibrant update to vanilla textures!

# **Features:**

### - Custom GUI
###   
### - Mob variation and overhauls
###   
### - Eating animations
###   
### - Block variation
### 
### - Custom block models
###   
### - Custom item textures (books, potions, swords etc)
###   
### - Connected textures
###   
### - Pet peeves and default bug fixes
###   
### - Minimal style changes
  
# **Style:**

This pack aims for a default style with a medieval tilt streamlining and beautifying the Minecraft world. After a while, you’ll forget what default even looked like.

items should feel more varied and functional, blocks should feel more random and natural, mobs should feel more unique and personable, all while maintaining a vanilla aesthetic.

worth noting that if you are using fabric or quilt you will need some mods to access all the features in the pack.  if you are using optifine you should be all set.

## Mods to get the full effect:
ETF -
EMF -
optigui
